step_rationale: Downregulated in ACS; regulates plaque-cell proliferation and inflammation.
mechanism: miR-520e is downregulated during acute coronary syndrome and inhibits cell-proliferation pathways relevant to plaque destabilization.

references.title: miR-520e and its promoter region DNA methylation as potential biomarkers in atherosclerosis.
references.journal: Biochemistry and cell biology = Biochimie et biologie cellulaire
